searchProcess.robotsOrAccessNotes: St Raphael Campus is a YNHH campus integrated under Yale SOM; visiting student rotations at YNHH (including SR Campus) are governed by the SOM-level Visiting Student Programs page captured for the YNH Children's Hospital packet.

userFacingSummaryDraft.oneSentenceSummary: Yale-New Haven Hospital St Raphael Campus visiting electives are governed by the Yale SOM Visiting Student Programs — VSLO-only, final-year US MD/DO students, no observerships.
userFacingSummaryDraft.whoThisIsFor: Final-year US MD/DO students at LCME or COCA-accredited schools applying via VSLO. International medical students must use the separate Yale international visiting page (documented in the YNH Children's Hospital packet).
userFacingSummaryDraft.whoThisIsNotFor: IMG graduates seeking observerships (Yale offers none); pre-clinical students; non-final-year students.
userFacingSummaryDraft.howToApply: Apply via AAMC VSLO (https://vslo.aamc.org/vslo/). Do not contact Yale faculty directly. The VSLO catalog determines specific clinical sites including St Raphael Campus when applicable.
userFacingSummaryDraft.estimatedCostSummary: Primary page does not state cost; international page (separate) states $4,775/4-week tuition.
keyCaveats: St Raphael Campus is not explicitly named on the Yale SOM visiting-student page; rotation site determined by VSLO catalog at elective level
Direct faculty contact not permitted as application path
International students must use the separate Yale international visiting page; $4,775/4-week tuition applies there
userFacingSummaryDraft.whyWeClassifiedItThisWay: Primary Yale SOM visiting-student page restricts to LCME/COCA-enrolled final-year students applying via VSLO. St Raphael Campus is one of YNHH's clinical sites and is therefore governed by this SOM-level policy.
userFacingSummaryDraft.sourceTransparencyNote: Yale SOM visiting-student primary page captured to T7 canonical capsule for this institution (identical hash to YNH Children's primary capture); international page documented separately on the YNH Children's packet.

userFacingSummaryDraft.possibleMetaDescription: St Raphael Campus electives via Yale SOM Visiting Student Programs — VSLO-only, US MD/DO final-year, no observerships, international lane on separate Yale international page.
